content.en:
The Miaofa Dao Ancestor also knew that he couldn't let the Forbidden Insect King be born, otherwise it would be really troublesome.

After all, they were far from being the Worm King's opponents.

Immediately, the Miaofa Dao Ancestor and the Golden Crow Palace Master made a full attack and rushed towards the Forbidden Insect Tree.

However, those lord-level taboo zergs did everything to stop the Miaofa Dao Ancestor, and even forcibly blocked the attacks of the Miaofa Dao Ancestor and the Golden Crow Palace Lord, and did not avoid it at all.

In such a situation, soon another lord-level forbidden zerg could not support his injuries and fell to his death.

At this time.

The Forbidden Zerg Lair Void kept collapsing, which was the origin of the Forbidden Bug King Worm Cocoon absorbing too much of the Forbidden Insect Tree, resulting in a large area of the Forbidden Zerg Lair collapsing.

Of course, even so, the Forbidden Zerg Lair will not shatter or be destroyed.

Airplanes!!!!

A wisp of fluctuation spread throughout the Forbidden Zerg Lair, making countless Dao Ancestors' hearts tremble.

This is the breath fluctuation that belongs to the insect king!

"It's not good, the Worm King is about to be born!"

Miaofa Dao Ancestor was shocked.

At this time, there were only four lord-level forbidden zergs, and all of them were seriously injured, and the other lord-level forbidden zergs had all fallen.

Immediately, the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor used some kind of forbidden treasure to instantly trap the two lord-level forbidden zergs, and forcibly got rid of the interception of the other two lord-level forbidden zergs, and shuttled to the side of the forbidden insect tree.

Soon, they came to the side of the Forbidden Insect Tree and attacked one after another.

I saw that the Golden Crow Palace Lord urged a Heavenly Emperor Weapon, and a terrifying blow broke out, hitting the insect king's cocoon.

And the Miaofa Dao Ancestor also used a terrifying killing weapon, which was able to burst out with a full force that was comparable to the second-step half-step Domain Ancestor, and it also hit the insect king cocoon.

Click!!

The cocoon of the king worm cracked, and a purple insect foot poked out.

Seeing this insect foot, the expressions of the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor changed drastically.

The insect king did not die, it was really bred.

Rumble!!!

The insect king cocoon was completely shattered, and a forbidden insect king who only had half the body of the ordinary forbidden zerg came out.

Its terrifying aura spread, causing the Golden Crow Palace Master and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor to retreat continuously.

"It hasn't reached the Domain Ancestor level!"

The Golden Crow Palace Lord rejoiced.

"It's true that it hasn't reached the Domain Ancestor level!" Mystic Dao Ancestor nodded, "We have estimated before, and the Forbidden Zerg Lair is currently unable to breed a real Insect King. Even if the Forbidden Zerg consumes the origin and sacrifices all the cocoons, they will not be able to create a real Worm King. This insect king is just a low-profile version of the insect king, and his strength is far from reaching the level of domain ancestors, it should be equivalent to the top second-step half-step domain ancestor, but the defense power is probably more than the third-step half-step domain ancestor, second only to the domain ancestor!"

The top-notch second-step half-step domain ancestors, that is also an incomparably powerful existence, they can't beat it at all.

Of course, this is already the best-case scenario.

If the real Worm King is born, he can kill them in one hit.

"It must be stopped! Otherwise, once it is allowed to devour too many lives, even if it can't become a worm king that is truly comparable to the domain ancestor, I am afraid it will be comparable to the combat power of the third-step and half-step domain ancestor, and we will not even have the qualifications to compete at that time!" the Golden Crow Palace Lord reminded the Miaofa Dao Ancestor.

"I understand!"

Miaofa Dao Ancestor nodded.

Immediately, the two summoned the other Dao Ancestors to evacuate the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

......

"The Worm King is born!"

Ye Tian felt the breath of the Insect King in the distance, as well as the message from the Miaofa Dao Ancestor, and his expression suddenly changed drastically.

The only fortunate thing is that this is a low-level version of the Worm King, and his combat power is only equivalent to the top second-step half-step domain ancestor, otherwise there would be no need to fight at all.

"Withdraw!"

One Dao Ancestor after another evacuated the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

And the Forbidden Zerg has little left at this time, and there is no way to stop the Dao Ancestors.

And at this time, the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor were also trying their best to resist the Insect King.

Fortunately, the fighting skills of this insect king are not high, and he has no means, but his pure attack power and speed have reached the level of the second-step half-step domain ancestor, and occasionally the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor have no way to resist at all.

However, the Golden Crow Palace Master and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor could only use the Forbidden Dao Technique and various secret techniques to circumvent and restrict the Insect King, and they did not dare to be attacked by the Insect King at all, otherwise they would be severely injured if they were touched.

It didn't take long for the Dao Ancestors to evacuate almost all of the Forbidden Zerg Lair.

Outside the Zerg nest is contraindicated.

A large number of Dao Ancestors fled in all directions as fast as they could, not daring to stay here at all.

Although the half-step domain ancestors said that this insect king is only equivalent to the top second-step half-step domain ancestor, his strength is far superior to that of the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor!

Therefore, they really didn't have the slightest confidence in the Golden Crow Palace Master and the Mystic Law Dao Ancestor.

Ye Tian's body took Ye Xingchen and Ye Xingyue and they left, although he was curious and wanted to copy the forbidden talent of the insect king, it was impossible to risk his body.

As for copying the body of the Dark King, he was just watching, and he didn't rush over, after all, if the identity of the Dark King was exposed, it wouldn't be worth it.

Soon.

The Golden Crow Palace Master and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor rushed out with their injured bodies in tow, followed by a purple forbidden zerg, which was the worm king.

At this time, this insect king was extremely angry, and he wanted to kill all the Dao Ancestors.

The Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor couldn't care about the other Dao Ancestors at this time, and they tried their best to start fleeing, and they got rid of the Insect King after a while.

After all, the method of chasing and killing the insect king only relies on speed, which is too simple, and it is difficult to hunt down the Golden Crow Palace Lord and the Miaofa Dao Ancestor.

And those Dao Ancestors who were slower or still watching the battle were miserable, they were slaughtered by the Worm King, and their corpses were swallowed by the Worm King's body and turned into nourishment for its growth.

---------------

In the void of the Dark Forbidden Domain, Ye Tian's copy body, the Dark King, stood here, feeling the aura of the Worm King in the distance getting closer and closer.

All the treasures on his body were transferred to the main body, so even if he fell here, there would be no loss.

He was waiting for the insect king, curious about what talent it had.

Soon, the insect king came, saw Ye Tian, and was ready to swallow Ye Tian in one gulp.

Copy the talent, probe!

In an instant, all of this insect king's talent was spied on by Ye Tian.

【Forbidden Talent: Dark Spear】

【Forbidden Talent: Purple Armor】

【Forbidden Talent: Perception】

The three forbidden talents are more than other lord-level forbidden zergs, fortunately, there are no forbidden talents hidden, otherwise the threat of this insect king will increase several times.

Ye Tian didn't say a word, and directly copied these three talents into his hands.

In an instant, he released the ability to copy the body, and the copy body instantly disintegrated and dissipated, giving the insect king no chance to devour.

“？"

The insect king was puzzled, what about the little insect just now, why did it suddenly disappear?

It didn't think too much about it, and immediately went to hunt down other Dao Ancestors.
